promotions.title: Pay your tax with Mox Credit Card and Split
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD500 cash reward while paying tax in instalments
promotions.description: Pay your tax bill with Mox Credit Card and apply for Instalment during the promotion period. Split your tax payment to ease financial pressure while earning up to HKD500 in cash rewards.

promotions.title: Tax Season Instant Loan
promotions.highlight: 💸 APR as low as 1.18% with up to HKD10,888 cash reward
promotions.description: Apply for Tax Season Instant Loan with APR as low as 1.18%. Get personalised quotation to instant disbursement all within the Mox app, plus earn up to HKD10,888 cash reward for successful application of designated Instant Loans.

promotions.title: Keeta Exclusive Flash Sale
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Save up to HKD80 on Keeta orders this month
promotions.description: Order on Keeta with your Mox Card and enjoy an exclusive discount of up to HKD20 off per order, saving up to HKD80 for the whole month. Plus, grab surprise vouchers and welcome rewards for an enhanced home party experience.

promotions.title: Xiaomi Flagship Camera Phone Deal
promotions.highlight: 📷 Up to 7% total cash rewards and 0% Instalments at Xiaomi
promotions.description: Shop at mi.com or any Xiaomi Store with Mox Credit Card and unlock up to 5% extra cash rebate (capped at HKD450) plus up to 12-month 0% interest instalments. Combined with standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack for total rewards of up to 7%.
promotions.quota: New customers can earn up to HKD2,150 in cash rewards with code XM1500MOX

promotions.title: Mox Journey from Scratch Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💥 Complete missions for chances to win rewards worth up to HKD8,888
promotions.description: Complete any of five simple challenges to get a Mox Scratch Card with instant prizes. Complete more missions to multiply chances of winning the top prize of HKD8,888 (HKD8,000 in Solana plus HKD888 cash reward).

promotions.title: Indulge and Grow Bonus Deposit Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🍽️ Chance to win 1-month 'free lunch' when you deposit your bonus
promotions.description: Deposit your bonus into Mox to earn interest while getting chances to win a 1-month 'free lunch'. For every HKD10,000 deposited, get one entry into the lucky draw, increasing your chances of winning.
promotions.cost: Minimum HKD10,000 deposit for one lucky draw entry

promotions.title: Mox x csl Best-in-Town Exclusive Plan Offer
promotions.highlight: 🤳 HKD1,380 rebates on csl plans + free NowTV Pass
promotions.description: Sign up for a new plan or renew your existing one with csl, setting up Mox Credit Card autopay to enjoy an HKD180 monthly fee rebate. Additionally receive a free Now TV beIN SPORTS Super Pack 1-Month Pass valued at HKD188.
promotions.cost: csl plan signup or renewal with Mox Credit Card autopay

promotions.title: Travel Pick & Go Free Add-on Coverage
promotions.highlight: ✈️ FREE add-on coverage with Travel Pick & Go insurance
promotions.description: Apply for Travel Pick & Go insurance and receive 1 FREE add-on coverage to help safeguard your trip from financial stress caused by unexpected events. Limited time offer as part of the Eggstra Care+ promotion.
promotions.cost: Travel Pick & Go insurance purchase required

promotions.title: MOXTRAVEL Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving
promotions.description: New customers who enter invitation code 'MOXTRAVEL' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving. This is enough for a round-trip flight to Asian destinations.

promotions.title: Samsung S26 Series Exclusive Offer at The Club
promotions.highlight: 📱 HKD100 off new Samsung S26 series at The Club
promotions.description: Spend HKD1,800 or more on The Club with Mox Credit Card and enter promo code CLUBMOX2026 to enjoy an instant HKD100 discount on the new Samsung S26 series. This discount is on top of the regular up to 2% Unlimited CashBack.
promotions.cost: Minimum spend of HKD1,800 at The Club

promotions.title: Uber Taxi Ride Offer
promotions.highlight: 🚕 HKD10 off each Uber Taxi ride, up to HKD90 off monthly
promotions.description: Pay for Uber Taxi rides with your Mox Card and enjoy HKD10 off each ride per month, up to HKD90 in monthly savings. Exclusive promo code required and must be claimed within the app.
promotions.cost: Uber Taxi ride payment with Mox Card

promotions.title: MOXDEPO Time Deposit Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💵 HKD2,500 cash rewards for new Time Deposit customers
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account using invitation code 'MOXDEPO', complete account opening within 15 days, place a Time Deposit of at least HKD250,000 within 7 days, and maintain the balance until the end of the Hold Fund Period to earn HKD2,500 cash rewards.
promotions.quota: Only for customers who have not held any Mox Account in the past 12 months

promotions.title: 1500MOX Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD1,500 cash reward and access 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: New customers using invitation code '1500MOX' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to HKD1,500 in cash rewards by meeting spending requirements. For a limited time, also unlock 2% Unlimited CashBack with no balance requirement.

promotions.title: MOXSMART Spend & Save Double Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🔄 20% CashBack at 5 merchants + 12% p.a. savings rate
promotions.description: New Mox customers who enter invitation code 'MOXSMART' can enjoy 20% CashBack for a full year when spending at HKTVmall, foodpanda, Uber, Keeta, or Taobao, plus standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on all spending. Additionally, earn a welcome savings rate of 12% p.a. from deposits.

promotions.title: MOXBILL26 HKT Bill Payment Offer
promotions.highlight: 💸 Up to HKD1,200 cash rewards + up to 2% CashBack for HKT bill payments
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account with invitation code MOXBILL26, apply for a Mox Credit Card, and pay HKT bills to unlock cash rewards worth up to HKD1,200. Also earn up to 2% CashBack on bill payments with Mox Credit Card.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served

promotions.title: Trip.com Exclusive Discount
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to 8% Off + Up to 2% Unlimited CashBack at Trip.com
promotions.description: Use your Mox Card to book hotels or flights on Trip.com and enjoy up to 8% exclusive discounts. Spend with Mox Credit Card to earn up to an additional 2% Unlimited CashBack, making every trip more rewarding throughout the year.

promotions.title: Personal Accident Cushion Double Reward
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Up to 2 months premium rebate with Personal Accident Cushion
promotions.description: Apply for Personal Accident Cushion insurance to receive up to 2 months' premium rebate. Double rebate of HKD120 for Value Plan or HKD200 for Max Plan, offering enhanced protection for you and your family.
promotions.quota: Limited to first 3,000 eligible purchases and customers who have not previously enjoyed rebate from Personal Accident Cushion
promotions.cost: Personal Accident Cushion insurance purchase required

promotions.title: Mission Bonus Rate
promotions.highlight: 🚀 Stack missions to earn up to 3.5% p.a. on deposits
promotions.description: Complete 4 easy missions – route payroll, invest, FX, or boost daily balance – to earn up to 3.5% p.a. on eligible HKD or USD Savings Deposits. Stack any or all missions, with bonus rates applied instantly and lasting until the end of the month.

promotions.title: CLUBLINK Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Rewards worth up to HKD1,400 when linking to The Club
promotions.description: New customers can open a Mox Account with code 'CLUBLINK', link their Mox Card to The Club account, and apply for a Mox Credit Card to earn rewards worth up to HKD1,400.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served
promotions.cost: Mox account opening and linking to The Club required

promotions.title: New FX User Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💱 Up to HKD175 cash rewards for new FX users
promotions.description: Try Mox FX for trading foreign currencies, making investments, or sending money overseas to earn up to HKD175 in cash rewards. Perfect for first-time FX users with Mox.

promotions.title: MOXHKT25 HKT Shopping Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🛍️ Up to HKD1,400 in rewards when shopping at HKT
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account using code 'MOXHKT25', link your Mox Card, and apply for Mox Credit Card to instantly receive 2,000 Clubpoints. Earn additional cash rewards up to HKD1,000 by spending HKD1,000 in one transaction at csl shop/1O1O Center/csl eshop or subscribing to HKT services.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served
promotions.cost: Minimum HKD1,000 spending at HKT merchants required for full rewards

promotions.title: 0% Interest Instant Clear
promotions.highlight: 💳 0% interest on credit card bills with one-off fee only
promotions.description: Clear other banks' or financial institutions' credit card bills of below HKD75,000 with 0% interest, paying only a one-off fee. Choose easy instalments of 3 to 6 months for more flexible payment options.
promotions.cost: One-off fee (amount varies based on loan amount)

promotions.title: Mox Payroll Benefits
promotions.highlight: 💸 1.5% p.a. bonus rate + 2% CashBack when setting up payroll
promotions.description: Switch your payroll to Mox to unlock a 1.5% p.a. bonus rate on your HKD/USD Savings Account. Additionally enjoy unlimited 2% CashBack or HKD4=1 Asia Miles on your Mox Credit Card spending.
promotions.quota: Available to all customers setting up payroll with Mox
promotions.cost: Free, requires setting up payroll deposit

promotions.title: Mox Referral Programme
promotions.highlight: 👫 Earn rewards by referring friends to Mox
promotions.description: Participate in the Mox Referral Programme to earn rewards by inviting friends to open Mox accounts. Simple sharing process with easy earnings for both referrer and referee.

promotions.title: Mox Zone on The Club
promotions.highlight: 🛍️ Exclusive year-round discounts on 100+ popular gadgets
promotions.description: Mox Zone is now available on The Club, offering Mox customers exclusive year-round discounts on over 100 popular gadgets. Plus, enjoy free delivery on orders of HKD400 or more.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served

promotions.title: Mox Asia Miles Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn Asia Miles through Time Deposits for travel
promotions.description: Set up a Mox Time Deposit to earn Asia Miles for travel. For example, a 12-month Asia Miles Time Deposit of HKD104,000 in new funds will earn 26,000 Asia Miles, enough for a round-trip flight to destinations like Tokyo or Osaka.

promotions.title: FlexiBoost Savings
promotions.highlight: 💰 Stable interest rates with progressive growth
promotions.description: FlexiBoost offers stable interest rates that won't change regardless of market conditions. Earn progressively higher interest rates as your wealth grows with this flexible savings solution.

promotions.title: Mox Credit Card Miles Rewards Scheme
promotions.highlight: ✈️ HKD4=1 Asia Mile on all spending + 0% FX Fees
promotions.description: Earn an unbeatable HKD4=1 Asia Mile on all spending with Mox Credit Card's Miles Rewards Scheme. Enjoy 0% FX Fees on foreign transactions and the flexibility to switch between CashBack and Asia Miles rewards at any time.
promotions.quota: Available to all Mox Credit Card holders

promotions.title: Unlimited CashBack with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 2% Unlimited CashBack everywhere + 3% at supermarkets
promotions.description: Earn 2% Unlimited CashBack on all spending with Mox Credit Card, plus enhanced 3% Unlimited CashBack at supermarkets in Hong Kong. All CashBack is in real cash, calculated instantly and credited to your Mox Account daily.
promotions.quota: Available to all Mox Credit Card holders

promotions.title: Instant Interest on Time Deposits
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Instant interest earnings on HKD and USD Time Deposits
promotions.description: Enjoy instant interest payment at the moment of deposit, unlike traditional banks' waiting periods. Available for both HKD Time Deposits and the new USD Time Deposit feature, making banking more convenient.

promotions.title: Year-round offers with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Exclusive offers with Unlimited CashBack or Miles
promotions.description: Enjoy fabulous year-round offers when using your Mox Credit Card at partner merchants. Earn Unlimited CashBack or Unlimited Miles on all your spending throughout the year.
promotions.quota: Available to all Mox Credit Card holders
